platform: Google Cloud Vertex AI and IAM
principal: Dedicated service account, federated workload principal, or managed workload identity per agent role
delegated_actor: Authenticated user or workload that impersonates the privilege-bearing service account
credential_strategy: Workload Identity Federation and service-account impersonation produce short-lived OAuth access tokens
audience_binding: OIDC audience during federation and target Google resource scopes/permissions
revocation: Remove IAM bindings, disable the service account, or deny the federated principal
audit: Cloud Audit Logs plus application task_id, agent role, original caller, and audit_id
limitations: General IAM and workload identity constructs are not an agent-specific directory object
Not every Google API supports every federation or downscoping pattern; verify the target service
